arts.sum: Speaking ahead of Sunday’s lunchtime kick-off, the Whites boss gave a fitness update on Joel Piroe and also explained the exit of Joe Gelhardt, who has joined Hull City on loan for the rest of the season. If the Struijk is sidelined for a longer period of time, then there would be worry over his options in the role.

arts.ttl: Victor Orta’s Sevilla flop subject to Leeds United ‘interest’ this month
arts.sum: Leeds United are claimed to be in the running for Sevilla striker Kelechi Iheanacho, signed by Victor Orta after he left last season’s Championship title winners Leicester City. Football Insider are now claiming that Leeds have grown interested in signing Sevilla striker Kelechi Iheanacho before the window shuts.

arts.ttl: Victor Orta has already sent Kelechi Iheanacho transfer message to Leeds United
arts.sum: Sevilla sporting director Victor Orta has hinted that Kelechi Iheanacho can leave the club this month amid reported interest from Leeds United . Meanwhile, on Tuesday, ex-Leeds director Orta, who is now at Sevilla, offered his verdict on Iheanacho's future and admitted that his future could lie away from the La Liga side.

arts.sum: Daniel Farke has admitted the injury blow to Pascal Struijk has left him concerned and will therefore remain open to transfer opportunities for defenders in the window if the centre-back is out for longer than fist thought.
